overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in period attire walking through an ornate, curved corridor with Art Nouveau metalwork and frosted glass walls. The environment transitions from a lantern-lit enclosed walkway to a brighter arched glass conservatory, suggesting a historic European setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved lantern-lit corridor with frosted glass walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved corridor, passing ornate wall-mounted lanterns on the right

entered.detail: decorative iron railing with intricate scrollwork running along the left side of the walkway
tall panels of frosted glass set in metal frames, allowing diffused light from outside
ornate wall-mounted lantern with warm yellow light and metal framework
arched metal ceiling with small circular windows near the top edge
row of small round windows set into the curved ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a curved, enclosed corridor with warm lantern lighting. Ornate metal railings line the left side while frosted glass panels on the right diffuse the daylight. The ceiling features small circular windows, and the space has a quiet, exploratory atmosphere typical of adventure games.

events.description: corridor ceiling transitions from solid metal to large arched glass structure, increasing natural light exposure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the corridor opens into a brighter conservatory space with glass overhead

entered.detail: large arched framework of glass and wrought iron replacing the solid ceiling, allowing more natural light
ornate lantern suspended from chains on the arched ceiling structure
decorative iron archway marking the transition between corridor sections

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions into a conservatory-style space with a dramatic arched glass ceiling. Hanging lanterns supplement the increased natural light filtering through the glass roof. The metal architecture becomes more elaborate with visible support arches, while the character continues walking forward through the evolving space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ornate, enclosed corridor that gradually opens into a bright, airy glass conservatory. It begins with a character walking through a curved walkway where warm lantern lighting contrasts with the soft daylight diffusing through frosted glass panels. As the character advances, the enclosed space transitions into a grander architectural style, with the ceiling lifting into a dramatic arched glass roof. The scene then expands as natural light floods the environment, blending with hanging lanterns to illuminate increasingly elaborate metal support arches. The camera continues forward, tracing the evolution from the quiet, intimate hallway into the expansive, light-filled conservatory.
